text:

Ok, thanks. Feel free to send the dateutil patches for your ports 
directly to me (to save time), because I was responsible for introducing 
this update. I'll also will check the tree for any dateutil consumers, 
that fail.

Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
